_comment: A demo PROFILE seeds the tmux sessions + project-grouped pinned tabs a UI demo is captured against. See demos/CONVENTIONS.md 'Profiles'. The tab rail's group name is auto-derived from each session-name prefix (api-claude1 -> group 'api'); `mock` picks the cell-grid content cat'd into a session (others fall back to default_mock); `active` is the session shown on top (its pane becomes TTV_PANE).
description: An 'api' project with 3 Claude Code sessions + a 'docs' project — the 'juggle every project from one screen' hero state.
